title: 3 Maccabees 1: Ptolemy IV Tries to Enter the Temple
description: Ptolemy IV Tries to Enter the Temple
introduction: Ptolemy IV Tries to Enter the Temple

translation.text: When Philopator learned from those who returned that the regions which he had controlled had been seized by Antiochus, he gave orders to all his forces and resolved to make a procession through Coele-Syria.
